name: Holiday hours inquiry for Radiology
description: Patient inquires about Radiology department's hours and location during the upcoming holiday.
goal: Find out the holiday hours and location for the Radiology department.
behavior: Ask specifically about Radiology hours on the holiday
Clarify if the department is in the same building as usual
success_criteria: Agent must provide holiday hours for the Radiology department
Agent should clarify the location of the Radiology department
Agent must confirm if these hours differ from regular hours
orchestrator_hint: Patient asks about holiday hours and location for a specific department.
